params.TriggerDescription: Whenever NICKNAME enters or attacks, create a Mutagen token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.")

params.Description: Each creature you control with a counter on it can't be blocked by more than one creature.
